title: v11: Internal assertion error only when compiling with -g2012/-g2009/-g2005-sv

features.name: generate_instance_out_of_bounds_index_access
features.description: Code should include a generate loop with a genvar where an out-of-bounds generate instance index is accessed via dot notation in an expression

features.name: generate_loop_with_genvar_scope_reference
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop using a genvar where the loop variable is used to scope-reference other generate blocks in a conditional expression
